docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHUKAKIDZE, TAMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WICKELMAN, JOSEPH $2,319.03 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,369.03 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,319.03 FILED BY SHUKAKIDZE, TAMAR AS TO DEFENDANT WICKELMAN, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY WITHOUT PROOF OF SERVICE. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JULY 31, 2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED DEC-12-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WICKELMAN, JOSEPH
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED MAY-20-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WICKELMAN, JOSEPH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WICKELMAN, JOSEPH

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-12-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF TAMAR SHUKAKIDZE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-13-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF TAMAR SHUKAKIDZE. DEFENDANT JOSEPH WICKELMAN DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE THE PROOF OF SERVICE BUT STATED DEFENDANT WAS PROFESSIONALLY SERVICED BUT FAILED TO FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHUKAKIDZE, TAMAR AS TO DEFENDANT WICKELMAN, JOSEPH
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-24-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF TAMAR SHUKAKIDZE. DEFENDANT JOSEPH WICKELMAN DID NOT APPEAR. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED IS DEFECTIVE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF TAMAR SHUKAKIDZE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH WICKELMAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
